title: Deep-sea coral reef world
content: The deep-sea coral reef scene, the blue-themed tropical underwater world, a large area of healthy and prosperous colored living corals, including dendritic corals, brain corals, disc corals and soft sea fan corals, a large number of tropical fish naturally shuttle through it, the near view is clear and fresh, the long view is gradually bluish and grayish, and the contrast is weakened. The natural light above is filtered through the seawater to form a soft volume light. There are fine suspended particles and a slight sense of flow in the seawater. Soft corals swing gently, the fish movement is smooth and coordinated, and a group of translucent lavender luminous jellyfish slowly appears, a total of 8-12, of different sizes. The umbrella body has a soft bioluminescent effect, the tentacles flutter gently with the waves, and there are weak purple light spots at the ends of the tentacles. The size of the jellyfish is in harmony with the proportion of corals and fish, and the luminous effect is soft and not dazzling, forming a dreamy light spot in the dark sea background. The movement of the jellyfish group is natural, in a slow ascending spiral, and some jellyfish swim in front of the camera to produce a slight lens halo effect. Maintaining the blue tone of the underwater light, the glow of the jellyfish coexists harmoniously with the faint reflection of the surrounding coral. As the jellyfish group swims, bubbles are produced, and the bubbles float up, forming the word "Seedance" in the sea
